security.csp: default-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost http://127.0.0.1:* ws://127.0.0.1:*; img-src 'self' asset: http://asset.localhost data: blob:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; font-src 'self' data:; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'none'; frame-ancestors 'none'; form-action 'self'

bundle.longDescription: Nebula coordinates policy-controlled security assessment missions and their evidence.
